meaning: vt.粗缝,润以油脂,(在烤肉上)涂油,狠揍,大骂
examples: Turn the shanks and baste them once or twice as they cook.
BASTE , arroser To spoon melted butter, fat, or liquid over foods.
Baste occasionally with the butter mixture and turn once near the end to crisp the skin.
Then thread fruit onto the skewers (alternating different fruits looks nice), baste them with a little melted butter before cooking.
